violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet wiping cloth found stored on the side of the wiping cloth bucket, solution at 0ppm. Wiping cloths should be stored in the sanitizing solution between uses.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use items found stored on the floor during inspection. Single use items should be stored off of the floor.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. Sauce and beef used for making pizzas were found at 56F and 52F during inspection. Potentially hazardous foods should be maintained at 41F or below.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Fruits and vegetables washed, handling, sink provided (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
